landing.heroTitle: Automate Your Entire Content Creation & Distribution Flow.
landing.subHero: Breakthrough content productivity solution for businesses. From a single URL, our Multi-Agent AI system automatically researches, strategizes, and drafts deep content for all digital platforms.
landing.architectureSub: Unlike single-prompt AI systems, our platform operates on a deep pipeline model. Four Agents operate independently and coordinate seamlessly to simulate a professional marketing content department.
landing.footer: © 2026 AI Content Planner. Leading intelligent content planning system.

analyzer.title: Analyzer (Multi-source Analysis)
analyzer.description: Automatically extracts and analyzes data layers from input URLs. AI researches context, identifies core messages, and target customer personas with absolute accuracy.

strategist.title: Strategist (AI Strategist)
strategist.description: Builds professional multi-channel content distribution strategies. Suggests creative perspectives, tone of voice, and optimal formats based on actual user behavior on each platform.

copywriter.title: Copywriter (Smart Pen)
copywriter.description: Transforms strategy into sharp drafts. Applies large language models to create engaging, highly persuasive articles consistent with brand tone.

editor.title: Editor (Professional Editor)
editor.description: Multi-layer review from semantics and grammar to article structure. Ensures sharp content, SEO-friendly, and maximizes conversion rates for every publication.

workspace.title: Input Content Source
workspace.subtitle: Enter the URL of the article or blog you need to analyze to start creating an in-depth content plan.
workspace.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: serious tone, focus on B2B audience, emphasize sustainability value...

stepper.title: AI Agent System is processing...
stepper.step1: Analyzer is extracting and understanding content...

placeholders.coreMessage: Harnessing artificial intelligence (AI) is not about replacing humans, but it's a tool to unlock creativity and optimize performance in the digital age.
placeholders.targetAudience: For marketing professionals, content creators, and entrepreneurs looking to apply AI to multi-channel content development strategies.
placeholders.takeaway1: AI Content Planner automates most manual work, from understanding source articles to distributing multi-platform content.
placeholders.takeaway2: The combination of 4 Agents (Analyzer, Strategist, Copywriter, Editor) ensures professionalism and personalization.
placeholders.takeaway3: Applying AI helps you spend more time on strategy and creating breakthrough ideas.

socialMock.linkedin:
Discover how AI Content Planner is completely changing our content creation landscape! 🚀

Instead of spending hours reading, analyzing, and rewriting posts for each platform, I now only need to paste a single URL. The system automatically performs deep analysis, extracts core messages, and distributes multi-platform content.

💡 Why should you care?
- Optimize 80% of work time.
- Ensure brand message consistency.
- Perfect combination of 4 specialized Agents, operating like a mini marketing department.

If you're struggling with the pressure of producing content every day, it's time to let AI share that burden.

#AI #ContentMarketing #MarketingStrategy #Productivity #AIContentPlanner

Stop struggling with daily content creation! 💡

AI Content Planner uses a Multi-Agent system to transform any article into viral social media posts.
